title: Flight Command
writer: Wells Root, Harvey S. Haislip, John Sutherland
actors: Robert Taylor, Ruth Hussey, Walter Pidgeon
plot: A rookie flyer, Ens. Alan Drake, joins the famous Hellcats Squadron right out of flight school in Pensacola. He doesn't make a great first impression when he is forced to ditch his airplane and parachute to safety when he arrives ...
